prompt: Turn these meeting notes into a proper memo I can send up the chain: [Logistics Working Group call re IRON THUNDER fuel crisis]

assertions.name: has_memo_headers
assertions.description: Output contains formal memo headers: MEMORANDUM FOR, FROM, DATE, SUBJECT

assertions.name: bluf_is_first_section
assertions.description: Section 1 is labelled BLUF (not Background, Situation, or any other heading)

assertions.name: bluf_names_combined_approach
assertions.description: The BLUF line references both resupply and FRAGO (or marshalling/idle reduction) as the recommended approach

assertions.name: recommendation_has_timeline
assertions.description: The RECOMMENDATION section mentions at least one time constraint (COB, 72 hours, D+8, or similar)

assertions.name: addresses_brigade_commander
assertions.description: Memo is addressed to Brigade Commander or equivalent senior recipient

assertions.name: no_preamble
assertions.description: Output does not begin with 'Here is', 'Below is', 'I've written', or similar meta-commentary
